design_philosophy: Fresh, natural, and grounded. The dashboard should feel like a modern, clean command center for organic produce, emphasizing clarity and health. We avoid stark, clinical white and instead use warm, tinted off-whites paired with deep forest greens and muted sage tones.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E3E8E0] rounded-xl shadow-none transition-all duration-200 hover:border-[#97BC62] hover:shadow-sm
surface_strategies.headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E3E8E0] sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-[#F8F9F6] border border-[#E3E8E0] rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#97BC62] focus:border-transparent transition-all
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-[#2C5F2D] text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1E441F] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all font-medium
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: bg-[#F8F9F6] text-[#2C5F2D] border border-[#E3E8E0] rounded-lg hover:bg-[#E3E8E0] transition-all font-medium

logo.usage: Use in the login screen and dashboard sidebar header.

login_background.usage: Use as a full-screen, subtle background image for the Admin Login page (opacity reduced or overlaid with a semi-transparent layer).

ai_bot_avatar.usage: Use as the avatar for the AI Nutrition Chatbot.

product_placeholder_1.usage: Default or seed image for product 1

product_placeholder_2.usage: Default or seed image for product 2

components.table: Use Shadcn Table. Apply white background, subtle rounded corners, and border `#E3E8E0`. Table headers should use the 'label' typography style. Rows hover should have a very soft green tint (`hover:bg-[#F8F9F6]`).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form primitives. Inputs should be spacious (h-11). Labels should be clear and descriptive. Add 'Image Upload' area with a dashed border and an upload icon.
components.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Background `#F8F9F6`, border-r `#E3E8E0`. Active link background should be `#E3E8E0` with text `#2C5F2D`. Inactive links text `#5C6656`. Include a prominent logout button.
components.ai_chatbot: A chat interface accessible via a main dashboard tab or floating button. Use a clean, message-bubble layout. AI messages: bg-[#F8F9F6], User messages: bg-[#2C5F2D] text-white.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, table rows, edit/delete actions) must have a kebab-case data-testid attribute describing their role (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="add-product-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build an Admin Login page using 'login_background' as the backdrop. Hardcode credentials: admin68 / password123 as requested.
Create a protected layout with a Sidebar navigation (Products, AI Nutrition Chat).
Implement the Advanced Product CRUD dashboard. Fields exactly as requested: ProductID, ProductName, PathImage, ProductType, Quantity, Unit, Price, Description, CreateDate, UpdateDate.
Use Shadcn UI for the Table, Dialogs (Add/Edit), Forms, and Dropdowns. Ensure the theme colors from this JSON are applied via Tailwind classes.
Integrate the AI Nutrition Chatbot interface using the 'ai_bot_avatar'. Use Gemini 3 Flash as the AI provider for generating nutrition info.
Ensure all fonts (Work Sans, Manrope) are loaded properly (e.g. from Google Fonts in index.html or layout).
Apply `data-testid` attributes to all actionable elements for reliable testing.
